sections.paragraph:
to be needy, to suffer want, Psa 34:11. Compare יָרַשׁ in Niphal.-Part. רָשׁ poor, needy, Pro 14:20 18:23 sometimes רָאשׁ Pro 10:4 pl. רָאשִׁים Pro 13:23, and רָשִׁים Pro 22:7.

Hithpalel, to feign oneself poor, Pro 13:7. See another under the root רָשַׁשׁ .

Derivatives, רִישׁ, רֵישׁ [רֵאשׁ].
